content:
## Version 1.2.0.5 (Latest)

### Added
- Note-Level Attention feature.
- Video recorder and export functionality using FFmpeg.
- Custom UI font support.
- New splash window.
- Split Vocal Part feature.
- Japanese C+V Phonemizer.
- Custom singer theme support (notes, pitch, phonemes, etc.).

### Updated
- SVP parser updated with support for voice groups.

### Improved
- Added margin for vertical scroll playback.
- Integrated Smooth Pitch Shape feature (merged from https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau/pull/1987).

### Fixed
- Fixed stationary cursor behavior.

## Version 1.2.0.4

### Added
- TikTok recording mode (based on https://github.com/keirokeer/OpenUtau-DiffSinger-Lunai/commit/a83d11444453d7c33130ef6d5465b0012f815381).
- Support for .ccs (CeVIO) project format.
- Support for .tssln (VoiSona) project format.
- Note opacity configuration.

### Improved
- Wave part editing: added trim and fade support (merged from https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau/pull/1968).
- Vibrato Variation and "Randomize pitch deviation" batch edit (merged from https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau/pull/1959).
- Adjusted part clamping logic for wave parts.
